2960.name: Aqua Eerie
2960.description: The level of the floor is somewhat lower than that of the doorway. The room is filled with water which reaches to your knees. More water pours in through holes about halfway up the walls, but the water level in the room doesn't seem to be rising.

npcs.name: Water weird
npcs.description: It looks like a twisting, feverishly demented pillar of frothy brine. Wisps of mist spin off like translucent tentacles, only to be drawn back to

2961.name: Smooth Passage
2961.description: You are moving along a smooth passage that leads north and south into darkness. You have lost 2520 experience.

2962.name: Dragon`s Lair
2962.description: A rank, reptilian stench permeates this large, square chamber. Large bones, both old and fresh, are scattered about. A passage leads off to the south and you can see another chamber to the north.

npcs.name: Huge female dragon
npcs.description: She is dark green as is her mate, and shares the same yellow eyes and sharp teeth.  The female of this species is much larger and more ferocious

npcs.name: Sea-green dragon
npcs.description: He is the dark green color of plankton rich sea.  His eyes are yellow and glare back at you angrily.  His teeth are also yellow and very sharp...
